daily.title: koala73/worldmonitor
daily.description: Real-time global intelligence dashboard. AI-powered news aggregation, geopolitical monitoring, and infrastructure tracking in a unified situational awareness interface

daily.title: ruvnet/RuView
daily.description: π RuView turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time spatial intelligence, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.

daily.summary: RuView 利用普通 WiFi 信号实现实时空间感知、生命体征监测和存在检测，无需使用摄像头。

daily.author: ayghri
daily.summary: 这是一个帮助编程助手直接给出答案、避免冗长隐藏的ADHD友好型输出技能。

daily.description: Easily and securely send things from one computer to another 🐊 📦

daily.summary: croc 是一个用于在计算机之间安全、便捷地传输文件或数据的工具，支持端到端加密和跨平台操作。

daily.title: likec4/likec4

daily.title: diegosouzapw/OmniRoute
daily.description: Never stop coding. Free MIT AI gateway: one endpoint, 278+ providers (90+ free), 500+ models — Kimi, Claude, GPT, OpenAI, Gemini, GLM, DeepSeek, MiniMax. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, OpenCode, Cline & Copilot. Quota-aware auto-fallback, RTK+Caveman compression saves 15-95% tokens, MCP/A2A, Desktop/PWA. Built by 500+ contributors
daily.author: diegosouzapw
daily.summary: OmniRoute是一个免费开源的AI网关，通过单一端点接入278个提供商（含90个免费服务）和500多种模型，并支持自动回退、token压缩、多种AI工具及桌面端/PWA。

daily.summary: Kronos是一个用于理解金融市场的语言基础模型。

weekly.summary: 该项目提供一个本地优先的代码智能图，通过构建持久化的代码库映射，让AI工具只读取必要部分，从而在代码审查和大型仓库工作流中显著减少上下文。

monthly.title: DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp
monthly.description: High-performance code intelligence MCP server. Indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph — average repo in milliseconds. 158 languages, sub-ms queries, 99% fewer tokens. Single static binary, zero dependencies.

monthly.summary: 一个高性能代码智能MCP服务器，能将代码库索引为持久知识图，支持158种语言，毫秒级查询且减少99%的token消耗，单静态二进制零依赖部署。

news.summary: 大语言模型的价值对齐存在西方文化偏见，导致斯里兰卡等多语言社会的本地价值观被忽视，LKValues 项目致力于解决此问题。
news.original_summary: Value alignment of Large Language Models (LLMs) has been shown to be culturally biased toward Western norms. This results in the mishandling of local values in multilingual societies such as Sri Lanka that have their uni

news.title: SoftReason：一种全可微的神经软符号演绎推理架构，用于高维感知数据
news.original_title: SoftReason: A Fully Differentiable Neuro-Soft-Symbolic Deductive Reasoning Architecture over High-Dimensional Perceptual Data
